name: Beef Pinwheel
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a shallow baking pan.
3. In a bowl, combine the ground beef, salt, Worcestershire sauce, beaten egg, ketchup, and bread crumbs. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly blended.
4. Roll out the meat mixture between two sheets of waxed paper to form an oblong about 1/2 inch thick.
5. Spread the cabbage and onion mixture over the rolled-out meat.
6. Roll the assembly tightly into a jelly roll shape.
7. Place the pinwheel in the prepared baking pan.
8. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes. Serve plain or with heated canned cream of vegetable soup as a sauce.
